page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Multiple sequence alignment software. the name is occassionally spelled as clustalomega, clustal ω, clustalω, clustal o, clustalo.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Multiple sequence alignment software. The name is occassionally spelled as ClustalOmega, Clustal Ω, ClustalΩ, Clustal O, ClustalO.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Multiple sequence alignment software. The name is occassionally spelled as ClustalOmega, Clustal Ω, ClustalΩ, Clustal O, ClustalO.
